title: Regex Pattern Creation
scenario: Given a set of requirements, create a regular expression pattern that matches the specified criteria. The requirements will be provided in a brief paragraph.
constraints: Must include at least 3 conditions (e.g., alphanumeric characters, specific characters, word boundaries)

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the regex pattern accurately matches the specified criteria
Assess the readability of the regex pattern
Evaluate the complexity of the regex pattern
Evaluate if the regex pattern includes any performance optimization techniques (e.g., possessive quantifiers)
